revision.comment: modifying too-long description per talk page consensus
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{short description|Topics referred to by the same term|noreplace|pagetype = Disambiguation pages}}</includeonly><noinclude>

{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: create automatic enwiki redirect
revision.text: #redirect[[:en:Template:Disambiguation page short description]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
revision.text: #redirect[[:en:Template:Disambiguation page short description]] <nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>

revision.comment: Imported from wikipedia at 2025-05-10 18:58:04 on [[Template:Disambiguation page short description]]
revision.text: Disambiguation page providing links to articles with similar titles

revision.comment: move the entire s.d. template into this template per suggestion
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{short description|Disambiguation page providing links to articles with similar titles|pagetype = Disambiguation page}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation}} [[Category:Disambiguation templates]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: fix category
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{short description|Disambiguation page providing links to articles with similar titles|pagetype = Disambiguation page}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation}} [[Category:Disambiguation and redirection templates]] </noinclude>

<includeonly>{{:Asshole}}{{short description|Disambiguation page providing links to articles with similar titles|pagetype = Disambiguation page}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation}} [[Category:Disambiguation and redirection templates]] </noinclude>

{{:Asshole}}{{short description|Disambiguation page providing links to articles with similar titles|pagetype = Disambiguation page}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation}} [[Category:Disambiguation and redirection templates]] </noinclude>

<includeonly>{{:Asshole}}{{short description|Disambiguation page providing links to articles with similar titles|pagetype = Disambiguation page}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation}} [[Category:Disambiguation and redirection templates]] </noinclude>

<includeonly>[[File:Asshole hat.jpg]]{{:Asshole}}{{short description|Disambiguation page providing links to articles with similar titles|pagetype = Disambiguation page}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation}} [[Category:Disambiguation and redirection templates]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Reverted 4 edits by [[Special:Contributions/Delpmart|Delpmart]] ([[User talk:Delpmart|talk]]) to last revision by Outriggr. ·
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{short description|Disambiguation page providing links to articles with similar titles|pagetype = Disambiguation page}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation}} [[Category:Disambiguation and redirection templates]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: add 'noreplace' parameter to allow this to be overriden
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{short description|Disambiguation page providing links to articles with similar titles|noreplace|pagetype = Disambiguation page}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation}} [[Category:Disambiguation and redirection templates]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: correct description
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{short description|Disambiguation page providing links to topics that could be referred to by the same search term|noreplace|pagetype = Disambiguation page}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation}} [[Category:Disambiguation and redirection templates]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: cat moved to documentation page
revision.text:

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{short description|Topics referred to by the same term|noreplace|pagetype = Disambiguation pages}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation}} </noinclude> <noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{short description|Topics referred to by the same term|noreplace|pagetype = Disambiguation pages}}</includeonly><noinclude>

{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{short description|Topics referred to by the same term|noreplace|pagetype = Disambiguation pages}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation}} </noinclude> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{short description|Topics referred to by the same term|noreplace|pagetype = Disambiguation pages}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] </noinclude> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Disambiguation_page_short_description here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Disambiguation_page_short_description for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> <includeonly>{{short description|Topics referred to by the same term|noreplace|pagetype = Disambiguation pages}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation}} </noinclude>
